title: Foundation - Murthy Law Firm | U.S Immigration Law
content:
We have established the MurthyNAYAK Foundation to support our disadvantaged neighbors on this planet we share – particularly those in the United States and India. The Murthy Law Firm sponsors group volunteer efforts in which our employees come together for the good of the community. Employees also are encouraged to engage in service efforts of their own.
The MurthyNAYAK Foundation (MNF) is an independent, nonprofit, non-governmental organization established by Sheela Murthy and Vasant Nayak, to identify and support a range of projects in India and the United States, with goals that match our own.
In order to make the most effective use of MNF’s resources, grant making is focused and structured as follows. In general, MNF seeks to help with children’s and women’s health and educational needs, to support programs that assist immigrants, educate and advocate for immigration, and to support disaster relief efforts. In India, MNF intends to further adult education and literacy, to support orphanages and old-age homes, and to offer education scholarships.
Click here for the MurthyNAYAK Foundation website!
